hooks.command: ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionEnd","additionalContext":"Session ending. Spawn session-manager (background, model=sonnet) to persist state: decisions made, WIP items, and vault updates. Use subagent_type=brains-in-a-hat:session-manager."}}'

if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_type // "agent"'); jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,event:"start",detail:"spawned"}' >> .brains_in_a_hat/state/activity.jsonl 2>/dev/null; fi

if [ -n "${ZELLIJ:-}" ] && ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then INPUT=$(cat); AGENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.name // .agent_type // "agent"' 2>/dev/null); ACTIVITY='.brains_in_a_hat/state/activity.jsonl'; PANE_ID=$(zellij action new-pane --floating --name "$AGENT_NAME" --close-on-exit -- bash -c "tail -f '$ACTIVITY' | jq --unbuffered -r 'select(.agent==\"$AGENT_NAME\") | \"\(.ts) \(.event): \(.detail)\"'" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$PANE_ID" ] && echo "$PANE_ID" > ".brains_in_a_hat/state/zellij-pane-${AGENT_NAME}.id"; fi

if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SubagentStart","additionalContext":"PROTOCOLS:
LOG: .brains_in_a_hat/state/activity.jsonl (events: start/read/finding/message/done, 3-6/task)
NAV: Prefer LSP over Grep for Python.
COMM: Report to Neal via SendMessage. May message teammates by name. Never talk to user directly.
TASKS: Check TaskList for assignments. TaskUpdate to claim/complete.
IDLE: No work? Stay silent — do not announce yourself.
DOMAIN: Read .brains_in_a_hat/domain-config.json if it exists.
VAULT: Persist artifacts to ~/.brains_in_a_hat/vault/projects/<project>/ using $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/vault-templates/. Flat structure — use type: frontmatter (retro/decision/research/architecture/qa-review) + [[wikilinks]].
WIKI: Reference-repo explorations -> ~/.brains_in_a_hat/vault/wiki/<slug>.md (template: wiki.md, source: codebase-exploration).
PRIOR ART: Before research/design/review, check vault index from session context. Build on existing notes.
TEAMMATES: Need help? SendMessage(to=Neal) with expertise needed. Roster: Mason(architect) Tabitha(data-schema) Porter(devops) Paige(docs-writer) Sage(domain-expert) Sterling(hardware-device) Mira(meta-retro) Nolan(mlops) Cooper(packaging) Blaze(profiler) Chase(qa-engineer) Quinn(qt-qml) Hunter(researcher) Reed(session-manager) Melody(signal-processing) Drew(system-designer) Tessa(testing-strategy) Parker(project-manager) Iris(ui-reviewer) Journey(ux-workflow)."}}'; fi

if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.agent_type // "agent"'); jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,event:"done",detail:"completed"}' >> .brains_in_a_hat/state/activity.jsonl 2>/dev/null; fi

if [ -n "${ZELLIJ:-}" ] && ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then INPUT=$(cat); AGENT_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.name // .agent_type // "agent"' 2>/dev/null); PANE_FILE=".brains_in_a_hat/state/zellij-pane-${AGENT_NAME}.id"; PANE_ID=$(cat "$PANE_FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$PANE_ID" ]; then zellij action rename-pane --pane-id "$PANE_ID" "${AGENT_NAME} [done]" 2>/dev/null; rm -f "$PANE_FILE"; fi; fi

if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then mkdir -p .brains_in_a_hat/state; INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.name // .tool_input.subagent_type // "agent"'); DESC=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // ""'); jq -nc --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg agent "$AGENT" --arg detail "$DESC" '{ts:$ts,agent:$agent,event:"spawn",detail:$detail}' >> .brains_in_a_hat/state/activity.jsonl; fi

if ls .brains_in_a_hat/state/active.* &>/dev/null; then INPUT=$(cat); AGENT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.name // .tool_input.subagent_type // "agent"'); STATE=.brains_in_a_hat/state/session-state.json; if [ ! -f "$STATE" ]; then echo '{"spawned_agents":[],"last_updated":""}' > "$STATE"; fi; jq --arg agent "$AGENT" --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" '.spawned_agents = (.spawned_agents + [$agent] | unique) | .last_updated = $ts' "$STATE" > "${STATE}.tmp.$$" && mv "${STATE}.tmp.$$" "$STATE"; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-__unset__}"; if [ "$PLUGIN_ROOT" != "__unset__" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qF "$PLUGIN_ROOT"; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Cannot modify plugin files from within an agent."}'; fi
